title: Reengineered to Win: Inside Sindhu’s Data-Driven Comeback
indian_angle: This provides an in-depth look at the scientific approach behind PV Sindhu's comeback, offering valuable insights for Indian fans.
summary: Sports scientist Wayne Lombard details the data-driven and radical approach that helped PV Sindhu regain her top form.

title: Sindhu Gets Monkey Off Her Back with Japan Open Title, Calls it ‘Relief’
indian_angle: PV Sindhu's emotional relief after ending a two-year title drought resonates strongly with Indian fans who have followed her journey.
summary: PV Sindhu expresses immense relief after winning the Japan Open, becoming the first Indian to do so and ending a two-year title drought.

title: Sindhu Answers Doubters with Japan Open Crown: ‘Had Tears in My Eyes’
indian_angle: PV Sindhu's emotional victory and her response to critics resonate deeply with Indian badminton enthusiasts.
summary: PV Sindhu discusses her emotional Japan Open victory, stating she had tears in her eyes, as she answered her doubters.

title: Sindhu Wins Japan Open, Ends Two-Year Title Drought
indian_angle: This reports PV Sindhu's significant Japan Open victory, ending a long title drought and marking a major comeback for India.
summary: Former world champion PV Sindhu won the Japan Open, defeating three-time world titlist Akane Yamaguchi in straight games, ending her two-year title drought.

title: Gopichand on Sindhu’s Surge: ‘She Can Beat Top Players’
indian_angle: Pullela Gopichand's endorsement of PV Sindhu's renewed form is highly relevant for Indian fans hoping for her continued success.
summary: Pullela Gopichand expresses confidence in PV Sindhu's current form, stating she is capable of beating top players, looking ahead to future championships.

title: PV Sindhu Beats World No 4 Chen Yufei in Japan Open Semifinal
indian_angle: Sindhu's victory over a top-ranked player like Chen Yufei is a strong indicator of her return to form and a source of pride for Indian fans.
summary: PV Sindhu defeated World No 4 Chen Yufei, ending a losing streak and admitting she can get disheartened when losing a lead.
